field.label: Scope
field.help: Global blocks the certificates on every instance; This instance blocks them on only the selected instance.

field.label: Applies to
field.help: The instance these blocks apply to. Used only when Scope is "This instance".

field.label: Default description
field.help: Optional label applied to every imported entry that does not carry its own description.

field.label: Fingerprints
field.help: One sha256 fingerprint per line, optionally followed by a comma (or space) and a description, e.g. "0123abcd...ef, compromised laptop". Colons/spaces inside a fingerprint are stripped; each must resolve to 64 hex characters. Invalid lines are reported and skipped; fingerprints already blocked at this scope are skipped.
